mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_grade WHERE student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY semester DESC, course_name ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_grade (student_id, semester, course_name, course_type, credit, score, gpa, import_user_id) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{semester}, #{courseName}, #{courseType}, #{credit}, #{score}, #{gpa}, #{importUserId})

INSERT INTO student_grade (student_id, semester, course_name, course_type, credit, score, gpa, import_user_id) VALUES
(#{item.studentId}, #{item.semester}, #{item.courseName}, #{item.courseType}, #{item.credit}, #{item.score}, #{item.gpa}, #{item.importUserId})
